responsibilities: Design and train automatic speech recognition models that accurately transcribe audio across diverse accents
Develop text-to-speech systems that generate natural, expressive synthetic voices for product applications
Build audio preprocessing pipelines including noise suppression, voice activity detection, and signal normalization
Fine-tune pretrained speech models such as Whisper on domain-specific and multilingual audio datasets
Optimize speech model inference for real-time, low-latency streaming applications on edge and cloud devices
Implement speaker diarization systems to distinguish and label multiple speakers within audio recordings
Evaluate speech model accuracy using word error rate and other domain-specific quality metrics
Collaborate with product teams to integrate voice capabilities into conversational AI and IVR systems
Curate and annotate audio datasets, establishing labeling guidelines to ensure transcription quality
Deploy optimized speech models to production using ONNX and quantization techniques for efficient inference
